ui_guidance.instruction: Click Add, rename segment to 'Moving_Segment', set color to Cyan.

api_chains: (slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().GetSegment((slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().AddEmptySegment('Moving_Segment')).GetColor

(slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().GetSegment((slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().AddEmptySegment('Moving_Segment')).GetName

(slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().GetSegment((slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().AddEmptySegment('Moving_Segment')).SetColor

(slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().GetSegment((slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetItemAsObject(0) if slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode') and slicer.mrmlScene.GetNodesByClass('vtkMRMLSegmentationNode').GetNumberOfItems() > 0 else None).GetSegmentation().AddEmptySegment('Moving_Segment')).SetName
